name: ajbn-connect
description: Read-only access to the Asian-Jewish Business Network (AJBN) public business directory and upcoming events. Designed for external AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Make.com, Zuplo) using the Model Context Protocol.

auth.notes: Anonymous access is allowed for read-only endpoints. Callers may optionally send an X-Agent-Key header to identify themselves for rate-limit attribution. Rate limit: 30 requests per minute per caller.

tools.name: list_public_member_directory
tools.description: List AJBN member businesses (aggregated by company + industry). Optional filters: industry, q (business-name search).

tools.name: list_upcoming_events
tools.description: List the next upcoming AJBN and Impact Lions events.

integration_notes.chatgpt_custom_gpt: In the GPT builder, click 'Add actions' and import the schema from https://connect.ajbn.co.uk/openapi.json. Set authentication to 'None'.
integration_notes.claude: Use the openapi_url above as an MCP tool descriptor, or wrap it with a small MCP proxy (e.g. mcp-openapi-proxy).
integration_notes.zuplo: Create a new API in Zuplo, import OpenAPI from https://connect.ajbn.co.uk/openapi.json, and add an API-key policy in front if you want to layer additional auth.
integration_notes.make_com: Use the 'HTTP > Make an OAuth 2.0 request' or plain 'HTTP > Make a request' module. No auth headers required; base URL is https://dwupmpddwyujxhacrims.supabase.co/functions/v1/agent-api.
